arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool: Merseyside Derby postponed due to Storm Darragh
arts.sum: The Merseyside Derby between Everton and Liverpool has been postponed due to safety concerns. Authorities have decided to call off the fixture – the final Merseyside Derby to be staged at Goodison Park – amid ‘mass disruption’ caused by Storm Darragh. The Athletic have confirmed the news, with official statements from both clubs expected imminently.
